title: 0light1levels15
description: A simple and lightweight rp that works in vanilla and allows you to see the exact light levels: 0, 1 and 15
body:
### Important info
- Does NOT require OptiFine to work
- Only works with 1.21.2 and above

### How does it work
Using the lightmap core shader implemented in 1.21.2, we now able to do this sort of things

### A little background
I was building a big area with cool stuff, and I needed to light it perfectly for the vibe. And this is much easier with some rps like HMS Optifine. But here's the problem, most of these packs don't work in Vanilla. So I decided to make my own pack. But at that moment I was too busy to work with the code, so I asked Microsoft Copilot for help. After 3 failures we finally got it working. Then I tweaked the result, made this cool icon and now it will be the first real working in vanilla such rp on Modrinth

### Also recommend
- **[Dark Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-smooth-gui)**
- **[Boosted Brightness](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/boosted-brightness-rp)**
- **[Small Held Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items)**
- **[Centered Crosshair Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/centered-crosshair-fix)**
